prompt: Edit image 1: Render the sleeping dog using the soft, painterly digital art style and color palette from image 2's cat portrait. Transform the background elements (couch, pillow) into a clean, stylized illustration with graphic shapes and wind effects inspired by image 3's background style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Re-render the sleeping dog with the soft, painterly digital art style and warm, muted color palette, including beige/grey tones and brown accents, derived from image 2's cat portrait. Simultaneously, transform the background elements, specifically the couch and zebra-print pillow, into a clean, stylized illustration incorporating graphic, abstract shapes and subtle wind-like effects, drawing style and element inspiration from image 3's background.
